name: Sunvine Thrasher
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖蔓の剣士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>サンヴァイン・スラッシャー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
1 Plant Normal Monster
If a "Sunavalon" Link Monster you control leaves the field by card effect: Destroy this card. If this card is Special Summoned: You can target 1 "Sunavalon" Link Monster on the field; this card gains ATK equal to that monster's Link Rating x 800. When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the GY: You can Special Summon that monster to your zone a Link Monster points to, but negate its effects.
mnst_eff:
1 Plant Normal Monster
If a "Sunavalon" Link Monster you control leaves the field by card effect: Destroy this card. If this card is Special Summoned: You can target 1 "Sunavalon" Link Monster on the field; this card gains ATK equal to that monster's Link Rating x 800. When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the GY: You can Special Summon that monster to your zone a Link Monster points to, but negate its effects.
eff:
1 Plant Normal Monster
If a "Sunavalon" Link Monster you control leaves the field by card effect: Destroy this card. action: Activates if other cards leave the field
Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Requires Normal Monsters as Link Materials
Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your field
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
